name: Pasta Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 lb elbow macaroni or other pasta shape
2 cups mixed vegetables: celery, onions, red and green bell peppers, zucchini, carrots, or spinach
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. In a pot of boiling water, cook pasta until just underdone; drain. Place pasta in a 9" x 13" baking dish sprayed with cooking spray; toss with Italian seasoning, garlic, crushed red pepper, tomato sauce, and Parmesan cheese. Pour stewed tomatoes over the top, then layer remaining ingredients, ending with mozzarella cheese. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes.
